full_function:
def cmd_update_ui_to_use_all_features(session_id: str):
    """
    update ui to use all features

    LLM-implemented via qwen3:8b by forge-command-implement
    """
    from agents.forge.memory import write_audit_entry
    scope = Path(get_session_paths()[0])
    results = list(scope.rglob('*'))
    results = [str(p.relative_to(scope)) for p in results if not p.name in ('.venv', '__pycache__', 'node_modules')]
    print()
    print('── update ui to use all features ──')
    for item in results:
        print(f'  {item}')  
    print()
    write_audit_entry(session_id, 'CMD_UPDATE_UI_TO_USE_ALL_FEATURES_EXECUTED', str(scope), str(len(results)), 'done')
